scripts.check: bun run check:autonomy && bun run check:core && bun run conformance exec && bun run check:runtime-sync && bun run check:compile && bun run check:dogfood && bun run check:public-agent && bun run check:agent-proxy && bun run check:examples && bun run check:proof
scripts.check:agent-proxy: cd services/agent-model-proxy && bun test test/*.test.ts && bunx tsc --noEmit
scripts.check:public-agent: bun test scripts/*.test.ts && bunx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck --moduleResolution Bundler --module ESNext --target ES2022 --types bun scripts/*.ts
scripts.check:examples: (cd examples/small-app && (bun install --frozen-lockfile || bun install) && bun run check) && (cd examples/library && (bun install --frozen-lockfile || bun install) && bun run check)
